evals.prompt: Design an authentication system for a web app using JWT sessions with refresh tokens.
evals.expected_output: The agent covers session issuing, refresh flow, revoke on logout, expiry metadata, trace IDs, secure password hashing, and audit logging.
assertions: The agent includes a refresh token mechanism
The agent mentions token expiry and revocation on logout
The agent recommends secure password hashing (Argon2id or bcrypt)

evals.prompt: How do I generate signed URLs for temporary file access that expire after 15 minutes?
evals.expected_output: The agent covers signed URL generation with TTL, verification on access, expiration handling, and generic error messages.
assertions: The agent includes TTL/expiration in the signed URL design
The agent verifies signature before serving content
The agent uses generic access-denied error messages (no info leakage)

evals.prompt: Prevent email enumeration on my login endpoint. Attackers can tell if an email exists by the error message.
evals.expected_output: The agent recommends generic error messages, same response time for valid/invalid emails, and rate limiting on login attempts.
assertions: The agent recommends using generic 'invalid credentials' message
The agent mentions timing attack prevention
The agent suggests rate limiting on login attempts

evals.prompt: Design an audit logging strategy for authentication events.
evals.expected_output: The agent covers logging create/update/revoke/grant events with actor identity, trace IDs, structured format, and retention policy.
assertions: The agent logs all auth event types (login, logout, grant, revoke)
The agent includes actor identity and trace IDs in log entries
The agent mentions log retention policy

evals.prompt: Implement role-based access control with admin, editor, and viewer roles.
evals.expected_output: The agent covers role definitions, permission checks, capability flags, audit logging for permission grants, and generic access-denied responses.
assertions: The agent defines role hierarchy with distinct capabilities
The agent mentions audit logging for permission changes
